instructions: Quantity: Current through electrode path from clamp output toward membrane (A)
Simscape-first action: I_clamp_sensor -> I_clamp_PS_to_SL -> To Workspace variable citt_I_clamp
If using Simscape, add a Voltage Sensor or Current Sensor and route through PS-Simulink Converter for logging.
Agent instructions: The current sensor is in series between n_clamp_output and R_series_5MOhm; positive sign follows the sensor p-to-n orientation from clamp output toward membrane.
automated_actions: Preview-only measurement: no probe blocks, logging blocks, lines, or model saves were added.
